synonyms: Open a Street Stall and Sell Vigorously

description:
Some people developed extraordinary talents after waves of spiritual energy were released by enigmatic "Spiritual Ruins Gates" that arose all over the planet twenty years ago. Spirit Warriors, who possessed supernatural abilities, were the name given to these talented individuals.

Particularly after demonstrating their unparalleled strength during the devastating Beast Tide Disaster, the uncommon "Space series" fighters were the most elite among them.

From his early years, Jiang Nan, an orphan who grew up in Jiangcheng, Lingzhou, had aspirations of becoming the greatest Spirit Warrior. He awakens as Lingzhou's second-ever space-type warrior at the age of sixteen, with the rarest and most potent ability of all.

Here's where his incredible journey starts...
